OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Brian Moore is present.
Attorney, Marina Franco, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Richard Ravenwood and Robert Dolores, are present.
Attorney, Jennifer DeMarco, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of JUN-21-2010 is vacated.
